member.name: M:SagaNet.Tests.Engine.SagaCompensatorTests.CompensateAsync_CompensatesAllCompletedStepsInReverseOrder
member.summary: After the builder wires OrderWorkflow, the forward-flow indices are: 0=ValidateOrder, 1=ReserveInventory, 2=Compensate:RI, 3=ProcessPayment, 4=Compensate:PP, 5=ShipOrder. This test marks steps 1 (RI) and 3 (PP) as Complete and expects both to be compensated.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Tests.Helpers.InMemoryWorkflowRepository
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory repository for unit tests.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Tests.Helpers.OrderData.SimulatePaymentFailure
member.summary: Set to true in test data to trigger payment failure.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Tests.Helpers.OrderWorkflow
member.summary: Forward flow: ValidateOrder(0) → ReserveInventory(1) → [Compensate:RI(2)] → ProcessPayment(3) → [Compensate:PP(4)] → ShipOrder(5)
